notes: 2026-06-11 GPU1 D320 capacity feasibility probe under short remaining lease: D320/L12/loop5 batch48 fit in memory (~49GB observed) but the 900-step shortened h84 curriculum did not reach a useful regime. Train CE step500/700/900=1.7790/1.1760/0.8789; h72/h84/h96 loop5 exact=0.0/0.0/0.0; h84 blank_acc=0.5523. Decision: do not treat width alone as validated by short probes. A real capacity test needs the same 2400-step h84 curriculum or a schedule that reaches low CE earlier; otherwise prefer loop/FutureSeed-state mechanism work.
